data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Recognizes the law that the time required to move to a target area is a function of the distance to the target and the target's size.
data.technical_spec: Interactive elements are designed to be large and easily clickable.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Minimizes decision-making time by reducing the number of choices and simplifying navigation.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined UI with clear, limited options in navigation menus.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related elements together to enhance user understanding and experience.
data.technical_spec: Visually connected elements through spacing and alignment.

data.title: Consistency Principle
data.description: Maintains consistency across different elements and interactions for predictability.
data.technical_spec: Standardized components and design patterns across the site.

data.title: Feedback Principle
data.description: Provides timely feedback to user actions to enhance understanding and UX.
data.technical_spec: Real-time feedback like hover effects, loading indicators, and error messages.
